title: Central Florida man accused of impersonating nurse arrested again
comment: A Central Florida man was booked again for playing nurse without the license — or the training. "Again" is doing a lot of work in that sentence.
excerpt: Central Florida man accused of impersonating nurse arrested again Yahoo News Canada

title: Florida man repeatedly caught driving with suspended license arrested again: FCSO
comment: His license is suspended; his commitment to driving is not. Deputies keep finding him behind the wheel — the one place he's not allowed to be.
excerpt: Florida man repeatedly caught driving with suspended license arrested again: FCSO FOX 35 Orlando
